id.description: The unique identifier of the admin role.

role_name.description: The name of the admin role.

block.description: Retrieves a ZCC admin role by ID or role name.

id.description: The unique identifier of the admin user.

user_name.description: The user name of the admin user.

user_type.description: Service the admin login is provisioned under. The upstream `/getAdminUsers` API requires this query parameter as a numeric value 1-4 (`1=ZIA`, `2=ZPA`, `3=ZID`, `4=ZDX`); for convenience this attribute also accepts the case-insensitive names `ZIA`, `ZPA`, `ZID`, `ZDX`. Defaults to `ZIA` when omitted.

block.description: Retrieves a ZCC admin user by ID or user name.

activation_copy.description: Email cc list for activation notifications.

add_app_bypass_to_vpn_gateway.description: Whether to add app bypass entries to the VPN gateway.

auto_fill_using_login_hint.description: Whether autofill uses the login hint.

clear_mup_cache.description: Whether to clear the MUP cache.

compute_device_groups_for_zad.description: Whether device groups are computed for ZAD.

compute_device_groups_for_zdx.description: Whether device groups are computed for ZDX.

compute_device_groups_for_zia.description: Whether device groups are computed for ZIA.

compute_device_groups_for_zpa.description: Whether device groups are computed for ZPA.

configure_tunnel2_fallback_for_zia.description: Whether to configure Tunnel 2.0 fallback for ZIA.

dc_service_read_only.description: Whether the DC service is read-only.

dest_include_exclude_char_limit.description: Character limit for destination include/exclude lists.

dest_include_exclude_char_limit_for_ipv6.description: Character limit for destination include/exclude lists for IPv6.

disable_dns_route_exclusion.description: Whether DNS route exclusion is disabled.

disable_parallel_ipv4_and_ipv6.description: Whether parallel IPv4/IPv6 resolution is disabled.

disable_reason_visibility.description: Whether the disable-reason field is visible to end users.

dns_cache_ttl_android.description: DNS cache TTL on Android in seconds.

dns_cache_ttl_ios.description: DNS cache TTL on iOS in seconds.

dns_cache_ttl_linux.description: DNS cache TTL on Linux in seconds.

dns_cache_ttl_mac.description: DNS cache TTL on macOS in seconds.

dns_cache_ttl_windows.description: DNS cache TTL on Windows in seconds.

dns_priority_ordering_for_trusted_dns_cr.description: DNS priority ordering for trusted DNS criteria evaluation.

enable_custom_proxy_ports.description: Whether custom proxy ports are enabled.

enable_deception_for_all.description: Whether deception is enabled for all users.

enable_dtls_for_zpa.description: Whether DTLS is enabled for ZPA.

enable_global_zcc_telemetry.description: Whether global ZCC telemetry is enabled.

enable_minimum_device_cleanup_as_one.description: Whether to enforce a one-day minimum device cleanup window.

enable_one_id_admin.description: Whether OneID is enabled for admins.

enable_one_id_user.description: Whether OneID is enabled for users.

enable_port_based_zpa_filter.description: Whether to enable port-based ZPA filtering.

enable_public_api.description: Whether the public API is enabled.

enable_react_ui.description: Whether the React UI is enabled.

enable_set_proxy_on_vpn_adapters.description: Whether to set proxy on VPN adapters.

enable_tunnel_zapp_traffic_toggle.description: Whether tunneling of ZApp traffic toggle is enabled.

enable_udp_transport_selection.description: Whether UDP transport selection is enabled.

enable_zia_user_department_sync.description: Whether ZIA user/department sync is enabled.

enable_zpa_auth_user_name.description: Whether to use the ZPA auth user name.

enable_zscaler_firewall.description: Whether the Zscaler Firewall is enabled.

execute_gpo_update.description: Whether to execute Group Policy update.

flow_logging_time_interval.description: Flow logging time interval in seconds.

follow_routing_table.description: Whether to follow the system routing table.

id.description: Synthetic identifier for the data source (mirrors org_id when present).

intercept_zia_traffic_all_adapters.description: Whether to intercept ZIA traffic across all adapters.

launch_react_ui_by_default.description: Whether the React UI launches by default.

org_id.description: Organization identifier returned by the API.

persistent_zscaler_firewall.description: Whether the Zscaler Firewall is persistent.

registry_path_for_pac.description: Windows registry path used to source PAC URLs.

show_vpn_tun_notification.description: Whether to show VPN tunnel notifications.

support_ticket_enabled.description: Whether support ticket creation is enabled.

use_add_ifscope_route.description: Whether to use 'add ifscope' route on macOS.

use_clear_arp_cache.description: Whether to clear the ARP cache on network changes.

use_default_adapter_for_dns.description: Whether to use the default adapter for DNS.

use_dns_priority_ordering.description: Whether to use DNS priority ordering.

use_pollset_for_socket_reactor.description: Whether to use pollset for the socket reactor.

use_tunnel2_sme_for_tunnel1.description: Whether to use Tunnel 2.0 SME for Tunnel 1.0.

use_v8_js_engine.description: Whether the V8 JS engine is enabled for PAC evaluation.

vpn_bypass_refresh_interval.description: VPN bypass refresh interval in seconds.

vpn_gateway_char_limit.description: Maximum length of the VPN gateway field.

web_app_config.description: Web/UI feature visibility configuration. All values are returned by the API as strings (typically "0"/"1" or feature codes).

win_zdx_lite_enabled.description: Whether Windows ZDX Lite is enabled.

zad_enabled.description: Whether Zscaler Active Defense is enabled.

zdx_manual_rollout.description: Whether ZDX manual rollout is enabled.

zia_global_db_url_for_dr.description: ZIA global database URL for disaster recovery.

zpa_auto_reauth_timeout.description: ZPA automatic re-authentication timeout in minutes.

zpa_client_cert_exp_in_days.description: ZPA client certificate expiration in days.

zpa_partner_login.description: Whether ZPA partner login is allowed.

zpn_enabled.description: Whether ZPA is enabled for the tenant.

block.description: Reads the full ZCC company configuration returned by the GET /zcc/papi/public/v1/getCompanyInfo endpoint. This is a singleton data source: there is exactly one company info record per tenant, so no filters are required.

udid.description: Filter for a specific device by UDID. When set, returns device details.

block.description: Retrieves ZCC enrolled devices. Can filter by username and/or os_type.

name.description: The name of the forwarding profile.

enable_do_not_disturb.description: Whether the template honours the OS Do-Not-Disturb mode.

cn.description: AND-list of criteria — every criterion in this list must match.

cs.description: OR-list of criteria sets. Each set is itself an AND-list of criteria in `cn`.

cn.description: AND-list of criteria — every criterion in this list must match.

id.description: Criterion identifier.

udid.description: Optional device UDID the criterion is scoped to.

name.description: Operator-visible name. Returned by the API and surfaced as Computed; cannot currently be used as a lookup key (see resource description for the temporary API limitation).

platform.description: Target operating system, surfaced as a name: `ios`, `android`, `windows`, `macos`, or `linux` (translated from the API's numeric platform code).

block.description: Retrieves a ZIA posture profile from /zcc/papi/public/v2/zia-posture-profiles. NOTE: lookup is currently restricted to the numeric `id` — the upstream `/zia-posture-profiles` list endpoint does not paginate correctly and therefore cannot be used to resolve a profile by name or by platform. Once that API is fixed, name-based and platform-based lookup will be reinstated; until then `id` is required.

http_proxy.description: Alternate HTTP proxy of scheme://hostname or scheme://hostname:port format

max_retries.description: Maximum number of retries to attempt before erroring out

max_wait_seconds.description: Maximum wait in seconds between retry attempts when rate limited

min_wait_seconds.description: Minimum wait in seconds between retry attempts when rate limited

parallelism.description: Number of concurrent requests to make within a resource where bulk operations are not possible

request_timeout.description: Timeout for single request (in seconds) which is made to Zscaler

auto_purge_days.description: Auto purge period in days. Supported values: `0`, `30`, `60`, `90`, `120`, `150`, `180`.

auto_removal_days.description: Auto removal period in days. Supported values: `0` (Never), `30`, `60`, `90`, `120`, `150`, `180`.

force_remove_type.description: Force remove type code. Supported values: `0` (Restrict), `8`, `9`, `10`, `11`, `12`, `13`, `14`, `15`, `16`.

id.description: Settings record identifier.

block.description: Manages ZCC device cleanup settings (singleton). The API only supports GET and PUT; create runs an initial PUT, update runs PUT, and delete only removes the resource from state.

active.description: Whether the fail open policy is active.

strict_enforcement_prompt_message.description: Message displayed for strict enforcement prompt.

tunnel_failure_retry_count.description: Number of retries on tunnel failure.

block.description: Manages the ZCC fail open policy. This is a singleton resource — the policy always exists and cannot be created or deleted, only updated.

id.description: The unique identifier of the forwarding profile.

name.description: The name of the forwarding profile.

duration_in_seconds.description: How long (in seconds) transient notifications stay on screen. API field: durationInSeconds.

enable_app_updates.description: Notify the end user when the ZCC app receives an update. API field: enableAppUpdates.

enable_client.description: Enable generic Client Connector notifications. API field: enableClient.

enable_do_not_disturb.description: Honour the OS "do not disturb" mode. API field: enableDoNotDisturb.

enable_persistent.description: Force notifications to stay on screen until dismissed. API field: enablePersistent.

enable_service_status.description: Notify on service status changes (tunnel up/down, etc.). API field: enableServiceStatus.

enable_zia.description: Master switch for ZIA-driven notifications (per-channel toggles live under `zia_notification_template`). API field: enableZia.

id.description: Numeric identifier of the template, carried as a string per Terraform convention. API field: id (JSON number).

is_default_template.description: Marks the template as the company default. Only one template should be the default at a time. API field: isDefaultTemplate.

zia_notification_template.description: Per-channel ZIA notification toggles. API field: ziaNotificationTemplate.

enable_zia_dns.description: Notify on ZIA DNS block events. API field: enableZiaDNS.

enable_zia_dns_popup.description: Raise a popup for ZIA DNS blocks. API field: enableZiaDNSPopup.

enable_zia_firewall.description: Notify on ZIA firewall block events. API field: enableZiaFirewall.

enable_zia_firewall_popup.description: Raise a popup (not just a tray notification) for ZIA firewall blocks. API field: enableZiaFirewallPopup.

enable_zia_ips.description: Notify on ZIA IPS block events. API field: enableZiaIPS.

enable_zia_ips_popup.description: Raise a popup for ZIA IPS blocks. API field: enableZiaIPSPopup.

enable_zia_persistent.description: Keep ZIA notifications persistent until dismissed. API field: enableZiaPersistent.

zpa_notification_template.description: Per-channel ZPA notification toggles. API field: zpaNotificationTemplate.

delay_posture_failure_seconds.description: Delay (in seconds) before reporting a posture failure to the user. API field: delayPostureFailureSeconds.

enable_device_posture_failure.description: Notify when device posture evaluation fails. API field: enableDevicePostureFailure.

enable_zpa_reauth.description: Notify the user when ZPA reauthentication is required. API field: enableZpaReauth.

zpa_reauth_interval_in_minutes.description: How often (in minutes) to remind the user to reauthenticate. API field: zpaReauthIntervalInMinutes.

block.description: Manages a ZCC notification template via /zcc/papi/public/v2/notification-templates. Controls which end-user notifications the Client Connector raises (app updates, service status, ZIA blocks, ZPA reauthentication, etc.). Per-service toggles live under the two nested blocks `zia_notification_template` and `zpa_notification_template`.

active.description: Whether the trusted network is active. API field: active.

condition_type.description: Match policy applied across the criteria below. The API accepts `ALL`/`ANY` (or the numeric forms `0`/`1`). API field: conditionType.

dns_search_domains.description: DNS search domains. API field: dnsSearchDomains.

dns_server_ips.description: DNS server IPs. API field: dnsServerIps.

hostname.description: Hostname used to identify the network. API field: hostname.

id.description: Numeric identifier of the trusted network, carried as a string per Terraform convention. API field: id (JSON number).

name.description: Server-side name. Most operators only set `network_name`; the API echoes `name` separately. API field: name.

resolved_ips_for_hostname.description: Resolved IPs for the configured hostnames. API field: resolvedIpsForHostname.

ssid.description: Wi-Fi SSID the network is identified by. API field: ssid.

trusted_dhcp_servers_ips.description: Trusted DHCP server IPs. API field: trustedDhcpServersIps.

trusted_egress_ips.description: Trusted egress IPs (NAT/public addresses observed from the network). API field: trustedEgressIps.

trusted_gateway_ips.description: Trusted default-gateway IPs. API field: trustedGatewayIps.

trusted_subnet_ips.description: Trusted CIDR ranges (e.g. "192.0.2.0/24"). API field: trustedSubnetIps.

block.description: Manages a ZCC trusted network via the /zcc/papi/public/v2/trusted-networks endpoint. The IP/domain criteria fields are List(String) on this resource (the v1 comma-separated string surface is gone); pass `[]` for criteria you do not want to set.

active.description: Whether web privacy settings are active.

enable_auto_log_snippet.description: Whether automatic log snippet collection is enabled.

enable_fqdn_match_for_vpn_bypasses.description: Whether FQDN matching for VPN bypasses is enabled.

enforce_secure_pac_urls.description: Whether secure PAC URLs are enforced.

export_logs_for_non_admin.description: Whether non-admin users can export logs.

grant_access_to_zscaler_log_folder.description: Whether to grant access to Zscaler log folder.

id.description: Settings record identifier.

override_t2_protocol_setting.description: Whether to override T2 protocol setting.

restrict_remote_packet_capture.description: Whether remote packet capture is restricted.

block.description: Manages ZCC web privacy settings (singleton). The API only supports GET and PUT; create runs an initial PUT, update runs PUT, and delete only removes the resource from state.

high_trust_criteria.description: Criteria that promote a device to the HIGH trust tier. API field: highTrustCriteria.

cs.description: OR-list of criteria sets. Each set is itself an AND-list of criteria in `cn`. API field: cs.

cn.description: AND-list of criteria — every criterion in this list must match for the parent set to be considered satisfied. API field: cn.

id.description: Criterion identifier. API field: id.

udid.description: Optional device UDID the criterion is scoped to. API field: udid.

id.description: Numeric identifier of the posture profile, carried as a string per Terraform convention. API field: id (JSON number).

low_trust_criteria.description: Criteria that promote a device to the LOW trust tier. API field: lowTrustCriteria.

cs.description: OR-list of criteria sets. Each set is itself an AND-list of criteria in `cn`. API field: cs.

cn.description: AND-list of criteria — every criterion in this list must match for the parent set to be considered satisfied. API field: cn.

id.description: Criterion identifier. API field: id.

udid.description: Optional device UDID the criterion is scoped to. API field: udid.

medium_trust_criteria.description: Criteria that promote a device to the MEDIUM trust tier. API field: mediumTrustCriteria.

cs.description: OR-list of criteria sets. Each set is itself an AND-list of criteria in `cn`. API field: cs.

cn.description: AND-list of criteria — every criterion in this list must match for the parent set to be considered satisfied. API field: cn.

id.description: Criterion identifier. API field: id.

udid.description: Optional device UDID the criterion is scoped to. API field: udid.

platform.description: Target operating system. One of `ios`, `android`, `windows`, `macos`, `linux` (case-insensitive). Translated to the API's numeric platform code (1..5) at the SDK boundary. API field: platform.

block.description: Manages a ZIA posture profile via /zcc/papi/public/v2/zia-posture-profiles. A posture profile bundles the device-trust criteria that ZCC evaluates against the local machine, classifying each endpoint into one of three trust tiers (high / medium / low). Each tier carries an OR-of-AND set of criteria: every criterion inside a `cs[].cn` block must match (AND), and matching any single set in `cs` (OR) promotes the device to that tier.
